results.title: Schools Closed in Mumbai Metropolitan Region Today As IMD Issues Orange Alert For Heavy Rain
results.description: All government, private and civic body-run schools and colleges in Mumbai will remain closed on July 6 (Monday). The IMD issued an 'orange alert' forecasting heavy rainfall accompanied by strong winds.

results.title: Buddha’s teachings vital in troubled world, says Governor
results.description: Himachal Pradesh Governor Kavinder Gupta said the teachings of Lord Buddha on compassion, the Middle Path, non-violence and wisdom are more relevant than ever as the world grapples with growing violence, intolerance, armed conflicts, environmental degradation and the erosion of moral values. Addressing the national conference, ‘From Nalanda to the Himalayas – The Unbroken Legacy [...]

results.title: Use only dynamic QR codes on ETMs for UPI payments, says BMTC
results.description: Use only dynamic QR codes on ETMs for UPI payments: BMTC
